name: Seven-Segment Seconds
description: A seconds counter driving a 7-segment display (0->9), adapted from Tiny Tapeout's Apache-2.0 tt05-verilog-demo (commit a7e71a2), taken spec -> lint -> simulation -> GDS on sky130hd entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Timing met: WNS 0.0 ns; 194 std cells
source_note: RTL adapted from Tiny Tapeout tt05-verilog-demo (Apache-2.0, commit a7e71a2); original self-checking TB; authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally (native iverilog sim + local ORFS synth).
